name: Monster Merge
author: Poki
description: Monster Merge is a casual merge where you merge creatures and unlock newer and stronger monsters that are even creepier. The game has a really nice art style that is at the intersection of spooky and cute. Simply drag and drop identical monsters to fuse them and create a stronger monster. Each time you discover a new type of monster, you will unlock a new part of the mysterious castle. Once you've explored all of the castle, you'll unlock a new world that is full of fairies, and a whole different world with a different and more colorful atmosphere! The game has other secrets and worlds for you to explore. You don't need to wait for Halloween to get a little spooky. Can you unlock every castle and world in this addictive merging game? How to play Monster Merge? Select and move creatures - Click and drag the left mouse button or your finger Who created Monster Merge? Monster Merge was created by Jeff Ramos. Play their other futuristic merge game on Poki : Galactic Empire . How can I play Monster Merge for free? You can play Monster Merge for free on Poki . Can I play Monster Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Monster Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
